principle: Universal skills VETO (boundary conditions). Domain skills GENERATE (empirical priors). Sequential, not compressed.

epistemic_stack.role: Domain skills produce hypotheses from empirical data
epistemic_stack.authority: ADVISORY — generates candidates, does not decide

epistemic_stack.role: Universal skills enforce boundary conditions on generated claims
epistemic_stack.authority: BINDING — can kill any claim that violates physical/mathematical law

epistemic_stack.role: Arif ratifies axioms the framework cannot verify
epistemic_stack.authority: ABSOLUTE — F13 veto on any axiom

contract_rules: Generator claims carry scope tags: {global|regional|local} and evidence: {theory|empirical|simulation}
Veto layer runs AFTER generator, never before — physics constrains, it doesn't hypothesize
Veto violations are HARD BLOCKS, not advisory — claim dies immediately
Sovereign ratification required for any new substrate axiom (not domain skills)
Lossy compression must include lossiness_metadata: {what_was_dropped, fallback_to_raw}

scope_tags.regional: Empirically validated in a domain but not universally. Requires provenance.
scope_tags.local: Site-specific observation. Highest uncertainty. Must carry sample/test refs.

evidence_tags.theory: Derived from first principles. Mathematically provable.
evidence_tags.simulation: Modeled. Has model spec + uncertainty band.
